subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which Mughal ruler built the Amber Fort?
question_hi: अम्बर फोट किस मुगल राजवादी ने बनाया था?
explanation_en: Jai Singh II built the Amber Fort.
explanation_hi: जाय सिंह एवं अम्बर फोट किसी ने बनाया था?

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Who was the first ruler of Mewar during the Chauhan dynasty?
question_hi: चौधारन विभवन्द्र समाज के पहले राजा कौन था?
explanation_en: Rao Jodhraj was the first ruler of Mewar during the Chauhan dynasty.
